display_text: Flayer's Bota, Tier 4: Neutral item with Bloodthirst active, gaining 15% base damage and 30 attack speed for 6 seconds. Bloodrush passive resets the cooldown on kill within 1200 range, enabling chain kills in team fights or skirmishes. An aggressive tempo item for carries and right-click cores. Stats: CD: 65s, Duration: 6s, Base Damage Bonus: 15%, Attack Speed Bonus: 30, Kill Reset Radius: 1200.
